summary: Tested WhatsApp features for iteration 67. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend code review verified all requested features: mobile chat bubbles (max-w-[85%], bg-[#dcf8c6]), quick reply buttons, openLeadPhone prop, sendWhatsApp function switching to WhatsApp tab, and floating action button on mobile. OTP authentication blocks automated UI testing.

issues: OTP authentication (MSG91) blocks automated UI testing - requires real OTP verification

critical_code_review_comments: WhatsAppInbox.js - Chat bubbles use max-w-[85%] on mobile, max-w-[75%] on desktop (line 166)
WhatsAppInbox.js - Outgoing messages use WhatsApp-style green bg-[#dcf8c6] (line 169)
WhatsAppInbox.js - Quick reply buttons appear only when within_24h_window is true (line 973)
WhatsAppInbox.js - Quick reply button pre-fills text message via setTextMessage(reply.text) (line 988)
StaffPortal.js - sendWhatsApp function switches to WhatsApp tab via setActiveTab('whatsapp') (lines 480-491)
StaffPortal.js - Floating action button visible on mobile (md:hidden) at bottom-right (line 1551)
StaffPortal.js - FAB menu shows recent leads with Call, WhatsApp, Update actions (lines 1560-1589)
CRMDashboard.js - sendWhatsApp function switches to WhatsApp tab (lines 1319-1328)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - OTP auth blocks automated UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff/Admin login requires OTP authentication (MSG91). Backend API tests can be run without authentication. All WhatsApp features verified: bulk send endpoint, job status endpoint, social settings with Facebook/Instagram IDs, chat bubble styling, quick replies, FAB on mobile.

backend_apis.POST /api/whatsapp/templates/bulk-send: PASS - Creates bulk send job, returns job_id
backend_apis.GET /api/whatsapp/templates/bulk-send/{j: PASS - Returns job status with sent_count, failed_count
backend_apis.GET /api/whatsapp/conversations: PASS - Returns conversations with within_24h_window field

frontend_components_verified.WhatsAppInbox.js - Quick reply buttons: VERIFIED - Shows when within_24h_window is true (line 973)
frontend_components_verified.StaffPortal.js - FAB quick actions: VERIFIED - Call, WhatsApp, Update for recent leads (lines 1566-1588)

rca_of_issue: No issues found. All requested features implemented correctly.
